title: Bauer Professional Hair Clipper and Grooming Kits for Men/High Precision and Adjustable Lengths/Stainless Steel Blades/Accessories Included (Hair Clipper Set)
features: HAIR CLIPPER SET – This hair clipper set includes a stainless-steel cutting head and 4 detachable clipper combs 3, 6, 9 and 12mm, to suit most desired hair lengths, plus accessories to cover all your hair grooming needs.
ACCESSORIES INCLUDED – As well as the 4 detachable clippers, the set includes 4 combs, scissors, a protective cap, cleaning gel and a cleaning brush.

HIGH PRECISION AND ADJUSTABLE CONTROL TAPER – The stainless-steel blades provide a fast and accurate cutting performance, giving you a smooth and comfortable grooming experience. The adjustable control taper lever can be used for blending and precision cutting to achieve a sleek fade haircut.

EASY TO USE – This mains-powered hair clipper is simple to power by an on/off button, its pivot motor reduces noise, and it also includes a long, 1.75m cord to provide you with great coverage when using your hair clippers.
BAUER PROFESSIONAL – Bauer Professional is the leading manufacturer of top-quality hair, beauty & personal care products. Browse the whole range at the Bauer Professional page on Amazon today.
description: Product Description Hair Clipper and Grooming Sets Accessories Included These hair clipper and grooming sets from Bauer Professional include everything you need to get a salon-quality trim from home. With stainless-steel blades that move smoothly over skin to reduce irritation, you can enjoy a comfortable and precise hair grooming experience. Giving you total control, each set includes detachable clipper combs of various sizes to suit your desired hair length, plus accessories to cover all of your hair grooming needs. Choose from the 3 styles available. KEY FEATURES: High precision and adjustable lengths Stainless steel blades Accessories included Rechargable Salon quality HAIR CLIPPER SET This clipper set includes a stainless-steel cutting head and 4 detachable clipper combs 3, 6, 9, and 12mm, plus accessories. 6 IN 1 GROOMING SET Includes 1 x large trimmer, 1 x small trimmer, 1 x nose trimmer, 1 x body trimmer, 1 x precision trimmer, and 1 x shaver trimmer, plus accessories and storage stand. HAIR CLIPPER TRAVEL SET Includes a stainless-steel cutting head and 11 detachable clipper combs between 1.5-25mm, to suit most desired hair lengths, plus accessories and travel bag. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always unplug the hair clipper before cleaning or replacing attachments. Do not use on dry or damaged hair. Keep away from water. Not suitable for use on children or infants. Always supervise children when using this product. Follow the manufacturer's instructions for cleaning and maintenance to ensure safe and proper use.
